title: ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Post-PCR Instrument Purification
author: Opentrons

steps.title: With this 9 part workflow, the...
steps.instruction: With this 9 part workflow, the OT-2 will follow [ArcBio Continuous RNA Workflow - Pre-PCR Instrument and Post-PCR Instrument experimental protocol](https://opentrons-protocol-library-website.s3.amazonaws.com/custom-README-images/43d313/ArcBio_RNA_Workflow_020922.xlsx) to convert up to 96 input RNA samples into cDNA libraries. This is Part 6 of 9: This OT-2 protocol uses the RNA Continuous Workflow, Post-PCR Instrument section of attached experimental protocol to perform post-indexing purification workflow steps.

steps.title: Mix post-indexing cleanup enzyme mixture with...
steps.instruction: Mix post-indexing cleanup enzyme mixture with samples held at 4 degrees on the Temperature Module.
